text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In der Hoch-Obrigkeitl. Buchtruckerey zu Bern sind folgende Bücher in gar geringem Preiß zu haben, als: 1. <BIBL><AUTHOR>J. H. Ringieri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>CX. Conciones de Coena Domini.</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Vol.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>. <YEAR>1680</YEAR>. das Exemplar in albo achthalben <PRIZE>bz.</PRIZE></BIBL> 2. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rissenii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Summa Theolog.</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>. <YEAR>1703</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>10. Batzen,</PRIZE> und auff Schreib-papier <PRIZE>14. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 3. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rodolphi</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Compend. Theol. Christ</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>. <YEAR>1713</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>8 Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 4. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Catechetischer Leuchter und Rauchwerck, d. i. Erklärung und Gebätt über den Heydelbergischen Catechismum,</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>, <YEAR>1711</YEAR>. mit dem Kupffer-Blatt haltet <EXTENT>15. und ein halben Bogen,</EXTENT> à <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 5. <BIBL><TITLE>Biblia Piscatoris</TITLE> <FORMAT>in 4to.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>, à <PRIZE>15. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL> 6. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seelmatters</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Ewig- vest-bestehender Berg Zion, oder: der vest-gegründete unüberwindliche Gnaden-Stand der Kinderen GOttes,</TITLE> gründlich vorgestellt über die Worte des 125. Psalms 9. 1. <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Bern</PLACE>. <YEAR>1704</YEAR>. à <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":32,"explanation":"Fixed encoding issues (mojibake) for German characters (ü, ä, ß, à). Corrected OCR errors (e.g., 'Ccena' to 'Coena', 'Rein' to 'Bern', 'Eremplar' to 'Exemplar', 'Pfalms' to 'Psalms'). Corrected XML structure: fixed mismatched closing tag (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>), changed semantic tag for page count from <PRIZE> to <EXTENT>, removed incorrect <FORMAT> tags around text '9. 1.', and standardized punctuation placement relative to <PLACE> tags."}

parsed.explanation: Fixed encoding issues (mojibake) for German characters (ü, ä, ß, à). Corrected OCR errors (e.g., 'Ccena' to 'Coena', 'Rein' to 'Bern', 'Eremplar' to 'Exemplar', 'Pfalms' to 'Psalms'). Corrected XML structure: fixed mismatched closing tag (</PRICE> to </PRIZE>), changed semantic tag for page count from <PRIZE> to <EXTENT>, removed incorrect <FORMAT> tags around text '9. 1.', and standardized punctuation placement relative to <PLACE> tags.
